name: FutureCrest Acquisition Corp.
business: We are a blank check company incorporated as an exempted company under the laws of the Cayman Islands on June 9, 2025, which will seek to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities.

exposures.sentence: We will seek to capitalize on the investment, operational, domain expertise and social capital of our management team in AI, digital assets, fintech, infrastructure, robotics and communications.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 24 months from the closing of our IPO or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
